headline: Mondelez Bets On Toblerone Premium Expansion While Managing Cocoa Pressures
summary: Mondelez International (NasdaqGS:MDLZ) has completed a new production line at Toblerone's Swiss plant, creating a global Center of Excellence for premium chocolate. The company is adjusting product recipes and launches, including reducing chocolate content in some items and leaning more on premium offerings in response to high cocoa prices. Management plans to direct future margin improvements from these changes into additional brand marketing for Toblerone and other chocolate products. For...
